data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes an engaging, visually appealing interface to enhance usability perception.
data.technical_spec: Uses sleek design with a dark theme and intuitive navigation.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by displaying limited options at once for user clarity.
data.technical_spec: Reduces cognitive load by categorizing content into easily navigable sections.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs buttons and interactive elements sized to reduce interaction time.
data.technical_spec: Employs large, tappable areas for critical controls on mobile and web interfaces.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Positions most popular or recommended content at the beginning and end of lists.
data.technical_spec: Uses algorithms to dynamically adjust content order based on user preferences.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits information chunks to improve memory retention during browsing.
data.technical_spec: Conveys information in bite-sized pieces to avoid overwhelming users.
